source_name: UBEC/state SUBEB and school-infrastructure planning references
notes: benchmark_estimate_needs_BOQ: planning allowance for a modest public basic-education package such as classrooms, furniture, toilets/water point and simple site works. Actual costs depend on classroom count, foundation, location, furniture, WASH, power and state procurement rates.

item: Basic primary health centre construction or major upgrade
notes: benchmark_estimate_needs_BOQ: planning allowance for a basic PHC construction or major upgrade package. The previous small support-package figure was too low for construction. Excludes major equipment, staff housing, ambulance, land, grid extension and unusual site works unless separately specified.

benchmark_estimate_needs_BOQ: planning allowance for one community borehole water point. Typically covers drilling, casing, pump arrangement, apron/drainage and testing at simple sites. Solar pumping, deep geology, treatment, storage tanks and reticulation can raise the cost substantially.

item: Community water system with storage and distribution points
source_name: WaterAid Nigeria / SURWASH-style WASH planning references
notes: benchmark_estimate_needs_BOQ: a community water system is bigger than one borehole. It can include a source, solar or powered pumping, elevated/storage tank, treatment/testing, public taps or standpipes and distribution pipework. Final cost requires hydrogeology, water-quality tests and engineering design.

item: 1 km laterite community access road with side drainage
notes: benchmark_estimate_needs_BOQ: planning allowance for a low-volume laterite access road with basic side drains. Paved urban roads, bridges, culverts, compensation, relocation, swampy terrain and asphalt surfacing can cost much more.

source_name: FMBN / Family Homes Funds / Nigerian housing-cost references
notes: benchmark_estimate_needs_BOQ: cautious 2026 planning benchmark for a compact 2-bedroom family home for about four people. Plausible planning range is about ₦18m-₦30m before land, estate roads, major drainage, grid extension, borehole, solar system, fencing, professional fees, approvals, developer finance costs and unusual foundations.

source_name: Rural Electrification Agency / mini-grid planning references
notes: benchmark_estimate_needs_BOQ: planning allowance for a small community solar mini-grid package. Final cost depends on load study, generation capacity, batteries, inverter capacity, poles, wiring, meters, distribution distance, security, O&M and tariff design.

item: 1 km neighbourhood drainage and erosion-control works
source_name: NEWMAP / ACReSAL flood and erosion planning references
notes: benchmark_estimate_needs_engineering_design: planning allowance for 1 km of neighbourhood drainage, culverts, erosion protection and related community works. This is not a verified unit-rate schedule. It must be checked with survey, hydrology, soil, outfall, right-of-way and BOQ design before use for procurement.

item: Very poor household support allowance for one year
notes: policy_assumption_needs_program_design: assumes ₦25,000 monthly household support for 12 months. Eligibility, targeting, payment fees, grievance redress and monitoring costs must be defined separately.

item: Disability or elderly support allowance for one year
notes: policy_assumption_needs_program_design: assumes ₦20,000 monthly support for 12 months for a disabled or elderly person. This is not an official entitlement level.

item: Child support allowance for one year
notes: policy_assumption_needs_program_design: assumes ₦15,000 monthly support for 12 months. Delivery should be linked to child welfare, school attendance, nutrition or safeguarding rules where appropriate.
